calendar.matters:
MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Sep-06-2007 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to all Counsel and Parties in Propria Persona as to why this matter should not be dismissed per CCP 583.360 for failure to comply with CCP 583.310 is heard this day. There being no appearance nor an objection filed, the court orders case dismissed pursuant to CCP Sections 583.310 and 583.360. Proceedings reported by: Karen Farnsworth CSR# 5162. (212)
